summary: Comprehensive testing of flashcard app completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major flows working correctly with minor UI issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Answer buttons have testIDs (answer-correct-btn, answer-incorrect-btn) but clicking by testID times out. Workaround: click by text ('Je savais !', 'Je ne savais pas') works correctly.
ui_bugs.impact: Buttons are functional, just need to use text selector instead of testID

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button clears auth state but navigation to login page is delayed in web preview. May require page refresh or is a timing issue with Expo Router state updates.
ui_bugs.impact: Logout functionality works (clears tokens), just navigation timing issue in web preview

action_items: Consider adding force=True or adjusting z-index for answer buttons to make testID selectors work reliably
Add router.replace('/(auth)/login') call in logout function for immediate navigation
All core features are working correctly - app is ready for use
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: All endpoints working correctly with proper auth, validation, and error handling
✓ JWT auth implementation is correct with Bearer tokens
✓ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses
✓ Leitner 3-box system implemented correctly with show_side alternation
✓ Gamification (XP, levels, streaks, badges) working as expected
✓ All 9 subjects seeded with 5 flashcards each
✓ Frontend uses proper React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes
✓ API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
✓ AsyncStorage used correctly for token persistence
✓ Mobile-first design with proper spacing and touch targets
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Using existing admin account and seeded subjects/flashcards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full-stack flashcard app with Leitner system fully functional. Backend APIs all passing. Frontend flows tested: login, registration, home, study session, report, profile, create card, logout. Minor UI issues with answer button selectors and logout navigation timing, but all features work correctly.

frontend_flows: Report page with percentage, XP, cards to review ✓
Profile page with XP, level, streak, badges, Leitner boxes ✓
